data.title: Metaplanet buys additional 319 Bitcoin for $26 million
data.description:
Japanese Bitcoin-focused investment firm Metaplanet revealed that it acquired additional 319 Bitcoin for $26 million on April 14.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/metaplanet-buys-additional-319-bitcoin/

data.title: CoinShares: Net outflow of funds from digital asset investment products was $795 million last week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the latest weekly data from CoinShares, as of the week of April 12, the net outflow of digital asset investment products reached US$795 million, with capital outflows for three consecutive weeks, bringing the cumulative outflow since the beginning of February to US$7.2 billion, almost wiping out the net inflow for the whole year. Bitcoin outflows ranked first, reaching US$751 million, but it still maintained a net inflow of US$545 million since the beginning of the year. Ethereum outflowed US$37.6 million. XRP recorded an inflow of US$3.5 million against the trend, and Ondo, Algorand and Avalanche recorded small net inflows respectively. After Trump temporarily withdrew tariffs, prices rebounded and total assets under management rose to US$130 billion.

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-04-14)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $2.69T, up by 1.77% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $83,034 and $85,544 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $84,492, down by -0.32%.

data.title: France Welcomes U.S. Tariff Suspension as a Step Toward Agreement
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, French Finance Minister Lombard has expressed approval of U.S. President Donald Trump's decision to suspend many planned import tariffs, viewing it as a sign of the U.S. government's willingness to negotiate with Europe. 

Trump announced last week that he would pause reciprocal tariffs on several trade partners, including the European Union. Lombard remarked, "I am surprised by how quickly Trump changed his stance." He noted that the direct impact of the tariffs would have been to slow U.S. economic growth and increase inflation. However, Lombard cautioned that it is premature to declare victory since some tariffs remain in place. "For this reason, Europe must maintain pressure," he added.

data.title: UXLINK announces integration with TikTok social account, entering new traffic market
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News UXLINK announced the integration of TikTok social accounts on the official X platform. Users can now log in to the UXLINK ecosystem through TikTok accounts, and use its self-developed OAOG protocol to achieve cross-chain access to Web3 decentralized applications (dapps) with a single account, covering DeFi, NFT, metaverse and other scenarios. At the same time, UXLINK's native token $UXLINK will be used as a cross-chain universal Gas to lower the user threshold.
Previously, UXLINK's integration of LINE social accounts attracted millions of new users, especially in the Japanese market. The cooperation with TikTok is seen as a key step in the globalization strategy. TikTok's large young user group is highly compatible with Web3 innovators, and is expected to accelerate the mainstreaming of Web3 technology.
The head of the UXLINK community said that this cooperation is a key implementation of the "social as the entrance" strategy, aiming to break the barriers between the traditional Internet and the blockchain world and lower the user threshold. At present, the function has been officially launched, and users can log in through the TikTok account to experience cross-chain services, which may set a new benchmark for cross-field integration in the industry.

data.title: Is Mantra Token the Next Terra? OM Token Collapses 90%
data.description:
The Mantra token (OM) plummeted by 90% during low-liquidity hours on April 13, 2025, wiping out over $5. 5 billion in market cap.

The post Is Mantra Token the Next Terra? OM Token Collapses 90% first appeared on Ecoinimist.

data.title: Gate.io Launchpool上线Web3.0 Plants vs Zombies(ZP)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will start ZP staking mining from 15:00 on April 16 to 15:00 on April 21 (UTC+8). Staking ZP and USDT to participate in Launchpool can share 30,303,030 ZP airdrops for free. Among them, the ZP mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 365%, and the USDT new user pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 97.82%. Early staking is now open.
